title: haplophyllum canaliculatum
intro: Haplophyllum canaliculatum, also known as the "Canal-leaved Dodonaea" or "Chinese Dodonaea", is a plant species belonging to the family Rutaceae. Traditionally used in Chinese medicine, Haplophyllum canaliculatum has been found to possess medicinal properties due to its flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenoids. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which can aid in reducing fever, relieving coughs, and soothing digestive issues. Haplophyllum canaliculatum is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for medicinal use, as well as being used in traditional Chinese medicine formulations and supplements.
